meaning: n.闪电 ("闪电") 英国第一种超音速喷气式战斗机,英60年代的主力机种。
examples: The tree was struck by lightning.
Another flash of lightning lit up the cave.
In the dugout, even a few Yankees got jumpy when the thunder boomed and lightning crackled.
Unfortunately, the researchers have not been able to generate ball lightning in the laboratory.
